"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact

String literal content passed to `cg.parse()` is injected verbatim into a `new Function()` body without sanitization. This allows an attacker to execute arbitrary system commands when user-controlled input reaches the parser. Any application exposing a math evaluation endpoint where user input flows into `cg.parse()` is vulnerable to full RCE.
    
### Patches

The vulnerability is addressed by using `JSON.stringify()` on string literal values in `lib/node/ConstantNode.js` to ensure they are treated as data rather than code. Users should upgrade to version 0.4.3 or later.
    
### Workarounds

Avoid passing un-sanitized user input to the parser or manually escape string literals in the input.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00393, "percentile": 0.31527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:31:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41507"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T14:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:31:45Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mauriciopoppe/math-codegen/security/advisories/GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r", "https://github.com/mauriciopoppe/math-codegen/pull/11", "https://github.com/hits3134", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41507", "https://github.com/mauriciopoppe/math-codegen/commit/4bb52d3030683362b3559ee8dd91350555a05f6b", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mauriciopoppe/math-codegen/security-advisories/GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mauriciopoppe/math-codegen", "summary": "Remote Code Execution (RCE) via String Literal Injection into math-codegen", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:32:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p6x5-p4xf-cc4r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.4.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "math-codegen"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.4.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Remote Code Execution (RCE) via String Literal Injection into math-codegen
